title: Strategic Partner Manager
description:
Our client is a leading MultiTech social media company. This is a 08 month contract role.

Job Responsibilities

1) Partner Management & GTM Execution

  • Support Partner Managers to develop and execute GTM plans with prioritized partners to drive adoption and growth across messaging and commerce solutions.
  • Drive disciplined business planning and execution tracking (e.g., pipeline/deal tracking, milestones, partner plans, follow-ups).
  • Provide ongoing partner education and enablement on company's products/programs, especially solutions leveraging APIs and advanced integrations.

2) Partner Integration & Enablement (Messaging + Commerce)

  • Facilitate partner onboarding and integration readiness, including training, product/process enablement, and handling partner inquiries.
  • Help partners understand how to operationalize company's solutions, including program requirements and internal workflows needed to launch and scale.

3) Issue Management / Escalations

  • Track, triage, and resolve partner escalations efficiently by coordinating with internal teams (Product, Engineering, Ops).
  • Maintain clear escalation documentation and timelines; ensure partners receive consistent updates and closure.

4) Ecosystem Growth & Opportunity Mapping

  • Support ecosystem expansion by identifying, qualifying, and onboarding new partners (as needed), with focus on scalable impact.
  • Map ecosystem dynamics and identify opportunities/trends relevant to commerce and messaging partners (inputs into strategy and prioritization).

5) Partner/Market Insights → Internal Influence

  • Collect partner feedback and market insights; synthesize and communicate actionable recommendations to influence product improvements and roadmap discussions.
  • Collaborate cross-functionally to translate partner needs into requirements, solutions, and execution plans.

6) Program & Operational Support

  • Support operational activities tied to partnerships (e.g., contracting workflow support, incentives/program tracking, coordination for launches).
  • Represent the team/portfolio where needed in partner forums or industry touchpoints (as aligned with the team).

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree or equivalent with min 5-10 years’ experience in partner management, account management experience in technology ecosystems (messaging, SaaS, cPaaS, enterprise software, commerce, ad tech, or APIs), with proven ability to manage multiple stakeholders and priorities.
  • Strong capability in GTM execution, partner enablement, and operational rigor (tracking, follow-through, stakeholder alignment).
  • Demonstrated ability to analyze data, derive insights, and use them to guide decisions and partner actions.
  • Proven cross-functional collaboration skills (Product/Eng/Ops) and ability to drive resolution through influence.
  • Familiarity with messaging platform ecosystems and/or commerce platforms/marketplaces is preferred
  • Good communication skills and business level proficiency in Mandarin and Japanese language to liaise with stakeholders from Greater China and Japan market.

If you are keen on this exciting opportunity, kindly ‘Apply Now’.

*Referrals are greatly appreciated*

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to Morgan Mckinley Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.morganmckinley.com/sg/privacy-policy. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

Morgan McKinley Pte Ltd

Ramitha Ravindran

postedCompany.description:
As a global professional services recruitment consultancy, Morgan McKinley connects specialist talent with leading employers across multiple industries and disciplines.


Our promise to you

You can get the best advice for your career at Morgan McKinley. Our team of consultants have either have an educational background in their sector or have industry experience. We take the time to listen to your long term goals and provide you with honest feedback to help you realise them.

Over the years many people have progressed their careers with us both here in Singapore and internationally and our global presence gives us insight into the domestic and international  markets. In Singapore we specialise in Banking & Financial Services, Legal, Compliance & Audit, Finance & Accounting, IT, Project Management, Sales & Marketing, HR and Supply Chain & Procurement.
